title: Sustainable Cloud Computing Technology Stack
description: A flowchart illustrating the layered technologies that enable sustainable cloud computing practices, from foundational infrastructure to end-user benefits.
elements: Renewable Energy Integration & Power Management Systems
relationships: Energy-efficient hardware forms the foundation for the cloud platform
Virtualization software runs on the hardware to maximize utilization
Autoscaling algorithms dynamically manage the virtualized resources to minimize idle time
Renewable energy and power systems supply clean energy to the infrastructure
Monitoring tools measure the energy use and carbon output of the entire stack
Green development practices ensure applications running on the platform are also efficient
